plugins.name: mir
plugins.description: Guide to the openmirlab music-AI toolbox. CLAUDE.md is a capability map routing music/audio tasks (source separation, structure analysis, transcription, chords, tagging) to the right openmirlab package with known-good install commands and license flags; /mir:use walks you from task to working output, grounded in each repo's current README rather than memory. Install this one to USE the tools.
